name: rn-perf
description: React Native performance toolkit: 43 Codex skills covering profiling, memory, bundling, native modules, animations, lists, bottom sheets, images, navigation, data fetching, storage, startup, perceived performance, production monitoring, app-size optimization, and Android release compatibility.

interface.longDescription: RN Perf bundles Codex skills for auditing and improving React Native performance across measurement, JavaScript rendering, bottom sheets, images, navigation, data fetching, storage, native profiling, memory, bundle size, startup time, perceived performance, production monitoring, Android release compatibility, and tooling.
defaultPrompt: Use $rn-perf-full-app-test to audit my React Native app.
Use $rn-perf-bottom-sheet to fix bottom sheet jank.
Use $rn-perf-android-16kb-alignment to check Android release compatibility.
